# iaas_kubernetes_subnet (Data Source)

Looks up a subnet within a VPC by name, resolving the `id` you pass as `subnet_id` on an `iaas_kubernetes_cluster` or node pool. Requires the parent `vpc_id`; the owner check is enforced against that VPC. Optionally filter by subnet `type`. Exactly one subnet must match.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iaas_kubernetes_vpc" "prod" {
  name = "prod-vpc"
}

data "iaas_kubernetes_subnet" "cp" {
  vpc_id = data.iaas_kubernetes_vpc.prod.id
  name   = "cp-subnet"
  type   = "private"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Exact subnet name to look up. Exactly one subnet must match.
- `vpc_id` (String) UUID of the parent VPC to search within.

### Optional

- `type` (String) Optional subnet type filter - `private` (control-plane subnets) or `public`. Omit to search all types.

### Read-Only

- `cidr` (String) CIDR block of the matched subnet.
- `id` (String) UUID of the matched subnet (use as `subnet_id`).
